snippet.title: Wasatch Skin Track
snippet.description:
Backcountry ski touring and avalanche education for the Wasatch. New videos before each storm cycle.

Topics: skinning technique, avalanche forecasting, touring gear, rescue drills, and trip planning in the Cottonwood Canyons.

Contact: wasatchskintrack@gmail.com

channel.title: Wasatch Skin Track
channel.description: Backcountry ski touring and avalanche education for the Wasatch.
channel.keywords: backcountry skiing ski touring avalanche safety wasatch cottonwood canyons gear trip planning
